query:
SELECT 
  id,
  emailSubject,
  emailBody,
  parsedData
FROM gmailImportLogs
WHERE emailBody LIKE '%给嘟嘟200%'
   OR emailBody LIKE '%给瑶瑶210%'
LIMIT 1;
